info.title: MiR Fleet Compatibility API
info.description:
This API provides RESTful endpoints in the format of software 3.X.

The API is intended to support sites that have an existing integration system that is compatible with the 3.x MiR Fleet API system.

get.summary: Gets the current evacuation status in Fleet as a List (For backwards compatibility, evacuation history is not supported)
Get details on specific evacuation (Only ID of 1 is allowed as evacuation history is not supported)
Get positions by the specified map ID.

post.summary: Create a mission in the mission queue.

requestBody.description: The request to queue an order.

delete.summary: Abort all pending and waiting orders. Waiting orders are orders that are waiting for their scheduled execution time.
Abort a scheduled order by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Guid identifying the scheduled order to abort.

put.summary: Change a scheduled order by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Guid identifying the scheduled order to change.

requestBody.description: The requested changes to the order.

get.summary: Get helper (entry) positions belonging to the given position ID
Gets a position's resource queue by ID.
Gets a zone's resource queue by ID.

angle.description: Angle of the hook in degrees.
